Flask==3.0.3
gunicorn==23.0.0
# psycopg2-binary (NOT psycopg2 from source). The binary wheel ships a
# bundled libcrypto under a mangled SONAME with RTLD_LOCAL — the case
# that defeats LD_PRELOAD-based channel-binding shims. The BPF cbshim
# attaches via uprobe at the ELF-offset level and works regardless of
# the wheel's RTLD scope, which is exactly what this e2e proves.
psycopg2-binary==2.9.10
